description.s: Stateless viewport management library. Reads root from URL, view config from viewport item. No module-level caching - sources of truth are URL + viewport item.

getRendering.name: getRendering
getRendering.description: Get the RenderingSystem synchronously (returns null if not yet initialized).

getRenderingAsync.name: getRenderingAsync
getRenderingAsync.description: Get the RenderingSystem asynchronously (loads viewport-rendering if needed).
